title: ipomoea marmorata subsp. marmorata
intro: Ipomoea marmorata subsp. marmorata, also known as the Marble Morning Glory, is a plant species from the Convolvulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ipomoea marmorata subsp. marmorata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
